Hey, this is Ian Hart.



And I’ve got an unusual DVD program that I want to send you for free.



This DVD is going to show you how to re-charge what I call the ‘electrical conductor’ in your body.



Otherwise known as your thoracic SPINE. 



Now, the thoracic spine runs from the base of the neck… all the way down to your abdomen. 



And it’s the only part of the spine attached to the ribcage.



Conventional medicine almost completely ignores it, yet I believe understanding the thoracic spine is vital to our health, our flexibility, our energy, and our feelings of positivity.



You see, here’s what happens as we age... 



Our posture, the way we hold our body, gets worse over time...



You’ve probably seen older people and how they hunch over, making them look small and weak?



A big reason is simply aging. 



Aging wears down the discs in our spine, causing them to compress.



On top of that, many of us sit hunched over computers or staring at our smartphones for hours a day. 



And that can eventually lead to muscle spasms and stress in our lower back, neck and shoulders.



Worse still, hunched posture make us feel moody, anxious and depressed.



Yet, there’s something we can do to not just combat this… but fix our posture, improve our mobility and upgrade our health.



Like I said, your spine is an electrical conductor. 



The more rounded your back? The more closed off your conductor.



However:



When your thoracic spine is recharged… using the simple movements I’ll show you… then it can conduct electrical messages to the rest of the body.



And when that happens you feel happy, energetic and more ALIVE.



So here’s the good news…



When you move your thoracic spine in the way I’ll show you on this free DVD…



It boosts your conductor… it unleashes the flow of electrical messages...



And suddenly you’re feeling more youthful, more active, more flexible and may even look taller.



You see, when we take care of the thoracic spine the rest of our body takes care of itself.



And this can reverberate into every area of your life.



That’s how powerful the body is.



I encourage you to try it and see.



I’ve put a set of 8 simple movements together into one easy to follow program.



Just copy what I do on the screen and I’ll be there to explain what’s happening… why it’s working… and to motivate and encourage you to keep going.



Best part is… the DVD is totally free. All I ask is that you cover the small shipping fee.



My name is Ian Hart and I look forward to helping you recharge your very own electrical conductor… the thoracic spine.



Notes:

I added some visual ideas. I’m super open to other ideas. I don’t know what your capabilities and access to relevant footage are like.



We may test different prices in near future… like Free + shipping vs $9 w/ free shipping. Ideally, make sure that won’t be too hard to edit in.



The point of the visuals is to magnify and accentuate the words. The words are the #1 priority. When in doubt, just put the words on the screen.
